evidence.schedule_note: Schedule fit must use explicit dated availability, not weekday/weekend label.

notes: The remaining self-repeat is intentional access/return movement inside the same car-to-car loop.
All self-repeat ids are present in explicit official_repeat_segment_ids rows with repeat miles and no-new-credit cue text.
The remaining self-repeat is intentional access/return movement inside the same car-to-car loop.
All self-repeat ids are present in explicit official_repeat_segment_ids rows with repeat miles and no-new-credit cue text.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Park/start at Avimor Spring Valley Creek parking
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Start the GPX before leaving the car. The track should begin and end at this parking point.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Leave car toward Twisted Spring
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: From the car, head toward Twisted Spring. Follow the GPX access line for about 0.12 mi before official credit starts.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Take Twisted Spring
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: Follow Twisted Spring. This earns: Twisted Spring segments 1-3. Section estimate: 0.75 official mi, 86 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Ricochet.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn right onto Ricochet
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Ricochet, turn right onto Ricochet. Use Ricochet - #2 for 0.01 mi. Look for signs: #2 Ricochet. This earns: Ricochet segment 1. Section estimate: 0.7 official mi, 471 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Shooting Range.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Continue onto Shooting Range
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Shooting Range, continue straight onto Shooting Range. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.1 mi. Look for signs: #2 Ricochet; #5 Shooting Range. This earns: Shooting Range segment 1. Section estimate: 0.28 official mi, 143 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Whistling Pig.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn left onto Whistling Pig
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Whistling Pig, turn left onto Whistling Pig. Use Whistling Pig - #3. Look for signs: #3 Whistling Pig. This earns: Whistling Pig segment 1. Section estimate: 0.88 official mi, 328 ft climb, 515 ft descent. Next decision: look for signs to Spring Creek.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn left onto Spring Creek
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Spring Creek, turn left onto Spring Creek. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.53 mi. Look for signs: #3 Whistling Pig; #8 Twisted Spring Trail; #9 Spring Creek. This earns: both Spring Creek official segments. Section estimate: 2.42 official mi, 1188 ft climb. Next decision: look for signs to Harlow's Hollows.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Turn onto Harlow's Hollows
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Harlow's Hollows, turn onto Harlow's Hollows. Use the named connector trail/road for 0.59 mi. Look for signs: #10 Burnt Car Draw; #20 Cartwright Road; #29 The Wall; #16 Harlow's Hollows. This earns: Harlow's Hollows segments 4, 3, and 2. Section estimate: 1.08 official mi, 82 ft climb, 301 ft descent. Next decision: look for signs to Harlow's Hollows Connector.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Continue onto Harlow's Hollows Connector
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Harlow's Hollows Connector, continue straight onto Harlow's Hollows Connector. This earns: Harlow's Hollows Connector segment 1. Section estimate: 0.88 official mi, 124 ft climb, 432 ft descent. Reverse direction would be steep: about 432 ft climb over 0.88 mi. Next decision: look for signs to Harlow's Hollows.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Continue onto Harlow's Hollows
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: At the signed junction with Harlow's Hollows, continue straight onto Harlow's Hollows. This earns: Harlow's Hollows segment 1. Section estimate: 0.33 official mi, 124 ft climb, 232 ft descent.

turn_by_turn_steps.title: Return via Spring Creek - #9, Twisted Spring Trail - #8, McLeod Way Greenbelt
turn_by_turn_steps.detail: After Harlow's Hollows, you are not fully back at the car. Use Spring Creek - #9, Twisted Spring Trail - #8, McLeod Way Greenbelt back toward Avimor Spring Valley Creek parking. Expect about 0.98 mi after the final official-credit segment. This return leg is part of the route even though it is not official challenge credit.
